description_long: This is a round, wide-mouthed vase with a bulbous body and a slightly flared rim. The surface is predominantly dark gray to black, with visible patches and irregularities suggesting it has been repaired or is composed of several fragments. The texture appears rough and matte, with subtle scratches and wear marks distributed across the exterior. The rim is thick and slightly uneven, giving the vase a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The interior is dark and shadowed, indicating it is hollow and capable of holding contents. Overall, the vase has an ancient, utilitarian look, possibly reminiscent of archaeological pottery.
description: A dark, round, wide-mouthed vase with a rough, patchy surface and a thick, slightly flared rim. The exterior shows signs of wear and repair, giving it an aged, rustic appearance.
description_view_0: The vase's front shows prominent patchwork and surface irregularities, with the rim's thickness and unevenness clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side reveals a smoother, less patchy surface, with subtle scratches and a more uniform dark coloration.
description_view_2: The vase appears more uniformly dark and less textured, with minimal visible patchwork and a rounded silhouette.
description_view_3: This view highlights additional surface wear and patching, with the bulbous shape and thick rim still prominent.
